query:
SELECT 
  extensiv_order_id,
  reference_num,
  extensiv_status,
  lifecycle_status,
  client_id,
  facility_id,
  creation_date
FROM order_tracking
WHERE reference_num IN ('3380922','3381901','3381903','3381904','3381905','3387496','3391434','3391436')
ORDER BY creation_date DESC
LIMIT 20;
